hooks.command: [ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux rename-window claude && tmux set-option -p @claude_pane 1 && tmux set pane-border-status top || true
if command -v afplay >/dev/null; then afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Pop.aiff & else printf '\a'; fi
if command -v afplay >/dev/null; then afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Pop.aiff & else printf '\a'; fi

[ -n "$TMUX" ] && tmux set-option -p -u @claude_pane && tmux set-option -p -u pane-border-style && tmux set-option -p -u pane-active-border-style && tmux set-option -p -u pane-border-format && tmux set-window-option automatic-rename on && ~/.tmux/bin/tmux-pane-border.sh $(tmux display -p '#{window_id}') || true
